response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates exceptional depth in full-stack development with strong expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and backend systems, including recent AI-agent infrastructure work. His architecture and performance optimization skills are well-documented through high-traffic system experience. However, the unexplained career gap raises questions, and primary stack gaps (Nest.js, Vitest) will require verification. Overall, his technical profile aligns strongly with the role's core requirements.
